recommendations.title: The 8th Night
recommendations.overview: With prayer beads in one hand and an ax in the other, a monk hunts down a millennia-old spirit that's possessing humans and unleashing hell on Earth.

recommendations.title: Memento Mori
recommendations.overview: The ghost of a lesbian high-school girl takes revenge on the people who used to bully her. And another young girl finds her old diary detailing her love and rejection when she was alive.

recommendations.title: Unlocked
recommendations.overview: A woman's life is turned upside-down when a dangerous man gets a hold of her lost cell phone and uses it to track her every move.

recommendations.title: Wonderland
recommendations.overview: In a world where an AI programme allows people to communicate with their deceased loved ones, a flight attendant and a mother question the meaning of reality and humanity.

recommendations.title: Wall to Wall
recommendations.overview: A man who poured his life savings into a new apartment discovers its walls are full of disturbing noises, hostile neighbors and unsettling secrets.

recommendations.title: Seobok
recommendations.overview: Ex intelligence agent Ki-heon is tasked with safely transporting Seo Bok, the first ever human clone, who holds the secret of eternal life. Several forces try to take control of Seo Bok to serve their own agendas.

recommendations.title: Mission: Possible
recommendations.overview: Chinese secret agent Da-hee receives intel that a large number of illegal firearms are being smuggled into Korea and is sent to investigate the case. She meets Su-han, who is supposed to help her with the case, but due to his lackluster skills they f

recommendations.title: The Bridge
recommendations.overview: The Bridge is a controversial documentary that shows people jumping to their death from the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco - the world's most popular suicide destination. Interviews with the victims' loved ones describe their lives and mental he

recommendations.title: Rampant
recommendations.overview: Ancient Korea, 17th century. While the paranoid King Lee Jo of Joseon, vassal of the Qing dynasty, feels surrounded by conspirators and rebels, a dark evil emerges from the bowels of a merchant ship and the exiled Prince Lee Cheung returns to the roy

recommendations.title: Lost in Starlight
recommendations.overview: When an astronaut leaves Earth for Mars, the vast infinite space divides star-crossed lovers in this animated romance that crosses the cosmos.
